title: Production shard execution managed audit store binding preflight

controls.title: Managed audit store preflight items are named
controls.nextAction: Use these items as the store-binding checklist before any production store connection.

controls.title: Managed audit store remains disconnected
controls.nextAction: Require real store owner evidence before flipping from preflight to binding.

controls.title: Signed production execution approval
controls.evidence: No signed production execution approval artifact is present in this candidate batch.
controls.nextAction: Capture a signed approval artifact before any production execution window can open.

controls.title: Managed audit production store binding
controls.evidence: The candidate remains archive-backed and does not connect to managed audit production storage.
controls.nextAction: Bind immutable production execution records to a managed audit store before real execution.

controls.title: Rollback and abort owner confirmation
controls.evidence: Abort and rollback semantics are documented as a candidate matrix, not signed by all service owners.
controls.nextAction: Have Node, Java, and mini-kv owners sign the abort and rollback responsibilities.

preflights.requiredEvidence: record schema has request id, approval id, source digest, outcome, and cleanup digest
same approval id and source digest produce one immutable archive key
production retention class is named before any store connection can open
store binding proof never renders credential values or raw endpoint URLs
cleanup proof digest can be linked without starting Java or mini-kv

stagePayload.growthStopCondition: Do not add another store preflight unless production storage ownership or retention rules change.

productionBlockers.message: Signed production execution approval is still pending. Capture a signed approval artifact before any production execution window can open.
Managed audit production store binding is still pending. Bind immutable production execution records to a managed audit store before real execution.
Rollback and abort owner confirmation is still pending. Have Node, Java, and mini-kv owners sign the abort and rollback responsibilities.

warnings.message: v2086 defines store binding preflight only; it does not connect to production managed audit storage.

recommendations.message: Move next to precise Java and mini-kv owner receipt requests instead of broad new sibling work.

nextActions: Use v2086 as the disconnected managed-audit-store checklist.
Ask Java and mini-kv next for owner receipts that bind abort, rollback, and cleanup responsibilities.
Keep production storage disconnected until a real store owner and approval artifact exist.
